stemHtml: What is the purpose of first-aid portable oxygen bottles?

options.a: They are used by the crew in order to prevent fatigue.
options.b: They are only to be used in case of a sudden loss in aeroplane pressurisation, for pressurised aeroplanes operated at pressure altitudes of 10 000 ft and above.
options.c: They are used for passengers who, for physiological reasons, might require oxygen following a cabin depressurisation.
options.d: They must be used if an onboard fire needs to be extinguished.
